segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why was the girl in hospital?
Nearly a week passed before the girl was able to explain what had happened to her.

translations.zh-Hans: 差不多过了一个星期，那个女孩才说清楚自己遭遇了什么。

segments.text: One afternoon, she set out from the coast in a small boat and was caught in a storm.

translations.zh-Hans: 一天下午，她乘一条小船从海岸出发，途中遇上了暴风雨。

segments.text: Towards evening, the boat struck a rock and the girl jumped into the sea.

translations.zh-Hans: 傍晚时分，小船撞上礁石，女孩跳进了海里。

segments.text: Then she swam to the shore after spending the whole night in the water.

translations.zh-Hans: 她在水里度过整整一夜后，游到了岸边。

segments.text: During that time, she covered a distance of eight miles.

translations.zh-Hans: 在此期间，她游了八英里。

segments.text: Early next morning, she saw a light ahead.

translations.zh-Hans: 第二天清晨，她看到前方有一盏灯。

segments.text: She knew she was near the shore because the light was high up on the cliffs.

translations.zh-Hans: 她知道自己已接近海岸，因为那盏灯高高地位于峭壁上。

segments.text: On arriving at the shore, the girl struggled up the cliff towards the light she had seen.

translations.zh-Hans: 到达岸边后，女孩挣扎着爬上峭壁，朝她看到的灯光走去。

segments.text: When she woke up a day later, she found herself in hospital.

translations.zh-Hans: 一天后醒来时，她发现自己躺在医院里。
